sections.sectionTitle: A Lamdangin Mihingte A Hot Pasian' Tungah Lungdam Kohna

verses.text: “ Topa tungah lungdam ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung
Tu-a teng mah, nisuahna leh nitumna, leilu lam leh leitaw lam, leitung pana ama kaihkhop, galte' khutsung panin a hong hotkhiat mite in ci kikkik ta uh hen
Pawlkhatte gamlakah gammang uh a, a ten'na ding uh khuapi tun'na lampi mu zolo uh hi
Gilkial dangtakin amaute sibup uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau' cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi
Amau' ten'na ding khuapi a tun' matengun amah in lampi manah amaute a paipih hi
Ama itna kip leh mihing tate tungah a lamdang ama sepnate hangin amaute in Topa' tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a gilkial a dangtakte phasak a, bangmah a neilote tungah na hoih tampi a pia hi
Pawlkhatte, khuamial sung, a zing sungah tu uh a, sikkol kibulhin gimna thuakin thong kia uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Pasian' thu sel uh a, Sangpenpa' thugente a nial uh hi
Nasep haksa tawh amaute' lungsim niamsak hi. Amaute puk uh a, a huh ding kuamah omlo hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau' cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi
Amah in khuamial sung leh a zing sung panin amaute lakhia a, amau a kihennate a botsat hi
Ama itna kip leh mihing tate tungah a lamdang a nasepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sumngo kongkhakte sukhamin sikzawlte tum nih a suah hi
Pawlkhatte amau' khialhna hangin a ci uh na a, a mawhna hangun gimna a thuak uh hi
Amaute in an peuhmah kih uh a, sihna kongpi tawh amaute kinai ta uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau' cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi
Amah in thu vaikhakin amaute damsak a, siatna ding panin amaute a honkhia hi
Ama itna kip leh mihing tate tungah a lamdang a nasepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen
Lungdam koh piaknate pia-in ama nasepnate lungdam la tawh amaute gensak un
Pawlkhatte, teembaw tawh tuipi-ah pai uh a, tui liante tungah sumbawl na a sem uh hi
Amaute in tuithuk tungah Topa' gamtatna a lamdang a septe a mu uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thu pia a, tuipi hualte a piangsak huihpi a nungsak hi
Amaute, vanah kilawnto-in, a thukna-ah kiasuk uh hi. A lauhuai siatna sungah amau' lungsim han'na a bei hi
Amaute zukham bangin hoisuk hoito uh a, a cihna ding mel uh thei nawnlo uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau' cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi
Amah in huihpi daisak a, tuipi hualte a bei hi
Tua ciangin, tua tuihualte a khawl manin amaute a lungdam uh hi. Amah in amaute' utna khua-ah a paipih hi
Ama itna kip leh mihing tate tungah a lamdang a sepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen
Amaute in mihon kikhopna sungah amah pahtawi-in, upate' kikhopna sungah amah phat ta uh hen
Amah in, a tunga a teng mihingte' gitlohna hangin gunte sehnel gam suaksakin ciktuite leikeu suaksak a, an tampi a pian'na leitang pen ci-lei a suaksak hi
Amah in sehnel gam pen bualtuite suaksak a, leitang keu pen ciktui a suaksak hi
Amah in tua munah gilkialte tengsak a, a ten'na ding uh khuapi amaute in a sat uh hi
Amaute in lo-ah an tuhin leenggui suan uh a, a gah tampi tak a ngah uh hi
Ama thupha piakna hangin ante nakpi takin pung a, amau' bawngte zong kiamsaklo hi
Amaute pen nenniamna, haksatna leh dahna tawh khiamsuk gawpin a kiniamkoih suk ciangin
amah in, amau a bawlsiate tungah simmawhna buak sukin lampi omlohna gamsungah amaute a vakvaisak hi
Ahih hangin amah in amau' thuakna sung panin a cimawhte laamto a, tuu honpite bangin amau' innkuante a pungsak hi
Lungsim thutangte in hih thu mu-in kipak uh a, a gilote in ahih leh amau' kam a cih ciat uh hi
A pil peuhmah in hih thute don hen la, Topa' itna kip lungngaingai ta hen.
